docs:
# Floating Input
A text field with an animated label that lifts as content appears.
## Import
```tsx
import { FloatingInput } from "@/components/ui/floating-input";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<FloatingInput type="email" disabled={false} placeholder={undefined}>Email address</FloatingInput>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Email address"`: Label
- **type** (string) — default: `"email"`: Type
- **disabled** (boolean) — default: `false`: Disabled
- **placeholder** (string): Placeholder
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add floating-input
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/floating-input
```
